name: Rice in Minutes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice according to package instructions.
2. Stir in 1/2 cup of freshly grated Parmesan cheese and 2 tablespoons of butter with the cooked, hot rice.
3. For Snappy Spinach Rice, stir in 1 cup of cooked spinach and 2 teaspoons of lemon juice.
4. For Savory Stuffing, stir in 1 tablespoon of butter, 1/2 teaspoon of poultry seasoning, and 2 celery stalks, thinly sliced.
5. For Curried Almond Rice, stir in 1 tablespoon of curry powder and 1/2 cup of chopped almonds.
6. For Lemon Dill Rice, stir in 1/4 cup of chopped dill and 2 teaspoons of lemon peel.
7. For Country Bacon Rice, stir in 4 slices of crumbled bacon and 1 cup of cooked peas.
8. For Hot Pepper Rice, stir in 1/4 teaspoon of Tabasco sauce and 1/2 red pepper, seeded and chopped.
9. Serve the rice dishes with fish, burgers, steak, or chicken as desired.
